name: P&L Dashboard
description: Profit & loss analytics dashboard with gross income, expenses, NOI, cash flow, breakdowns by category, property comparison, and projections.

slots.summary-cards: Gross income, expenses, NOI, cash flow
slots.income-breakdown: Rental income, other income by category

visual_brief: Financial dashboard with a header containing title, property/portfolio selector, and date range filter. A summary metrics row shows gross income, total expenses, NOI (net operating income), and cash flow as large value cards with trend indicators. Below, two side-by-side breakdown panels: income categories (rent, fees, other) and expense categories (maintenance, insurance, utilities, management) displayed as horizontal bar charts or itemized lists with amounts. A property comparison table shows these metrics per property. A projections section shows a line chart of projected vs. actual income/expenses.

responsive.mobile: Summary metrics in a 2x2 grid. Breakdown panels stack vertically. Property comparison becomes a scrollable card list. Projections chart takes full width with simplified labels.
responsive.tablet: Metrics in a single row. Breakdowns side by side. Comparison table with horizontal scroll.
responsive.desktop: Full dashboard grid with all sections visible. Charts and tables at comfortable sizes.
